title: Mapmakers SMP
description: This is a small collection of Vanilla Improvement Mods that are mainly used for the SMP of Members from Minecraft Realms. It also adds Simple Voice Chat which is required!
body:
# This is the Modpack for the official Mapmakers SMP
# 

![Realms Convention 2023](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/946ff16866c4d25bd05f8de546c8de2211acfa45.jpeg)

**This Modpack is not required to join the SMP, but also adds the Simple Voice Chat Modification which is in fact required to be able to join the SMP.**

**Mods that are required:**

- Simple Voice Chat

**Mods which improve the server experience and are recommended:**

- Armor Stands
- Distant Horizons
